title: lotus creticus subsp. collinus
intro: Lotus creticus subsp. collinus, also known as the narrow-leaved lotus, is a plant species within the lotus genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lotus creticus subsp. collinus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
